title: Tremor documentation

referral.text: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.
referral.rationale: Supports adult rest, asymmetric, postural and head tremor features, function, medicine and referral context for tremor; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Body part, side, rest or action pattern, onset, progression, triggers, function, medicines, alcohol, thyroid context, examination and diagnosis are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for tremor.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
